summary: 40 frames screenshotted from rideglory.pen; all 16 unknown frames resolved (6 out-of-scope, 10 in-scope); critical corrections delivered: ELB5u/eK2WW/heldR are Maintenance Form Step 2 not registration; PMuA4 is a CTA reference sheet not a screen; f0lXw is the actual registration detail; full design token set extracted; per-screen specs written for all 34 confirmed/component frames

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.detail: pencil-frame-map.md and design.md written; 27 per-screen spec files produced

qualityGates.name: all_frames_screenshotted
qualityGates.detail: 40 of 40 frames screenshotted via mcp__pencil__get_screenshot. Note: Pencil MCP returns screenshots as inline AI-visible images, not saved PNG files — screenshots/ directory is empty by design. All visual content was analyzed and documented in per-screen spec files.

qualityGates.name: unknown_frames_resolved
qualityGates.detail: 16 of 16 unknown frames resolved: 10 in-scope (uVOQl=Login, MrYmb=Register, VrqVl=Splash, UYeeY=EmailSent, YCuIq=VehicleSheet, pQCmS=RegistrationForm, DJOZ2=RiderProfile, f0lXw=MyRegistration, o7KqgL=MaintenanceList, VKLP4=MaintenanceDetail); 6 out-of-scope (LDsMT, b5YFuy, IUxas, UqpLS, qs5o1, Q44tYx)

qualityGates.name: architect_questions_answered
qualityGates.detail: All 7 architect open questions answered in design.md: (1) 16 unknowns resolved; (2) PMuA4 is a reference sheet not a screen, zbCa0 is the only form; (3) t7MYzR is full-page screen not dialog — recommend inline state in login_view.dart; (4) XJtvl is my_registrations_page.dart; (5) CRITICAL: ELB5u/eK2WW/heldR are Maintenance Form Step 2 not registration_detail_page — architect change map was wrong; (6) Gv2Rr confirmed as rider_telemetry_panel.dart; (7) per-frame tokens documented in spec files

qualityGates.name: no_protected_files_touched
qualityGates.detail: No Flutter code written. No domain/, data/, DI, or protected files modified. Only analysis/ and handoffs/ artifacts written.

qualityGates.name: critical_corrections_documented
qualityGates.detail: Two critical corrections from PRD/architect mapping documented and escalated: (A) ELB5u/eK2WW/heldR are maintenance not registration; (B) PMuA4 is a design reference sheet not an EventForm screen state

escalations.subject: ELB5u/eK2WW/heldR frame mapping was wrong in PRD and architect handoff
escalations.detail: The PRD and architect change map assigned these frames to registration_detail_page.dart. Screenshots prove they are Maintenance Form Step 2 variants. Frontend must implement them in maintenance_form_page.dart, NOT registration_detail_page.dart.
escalations.resolution: Design corrects the mapping. Frontend must follow design.md, not PRD §4 or architect change map for these 3 frames.

escalations.subject: t7MYzR Forgot Password requires human decision on routing
escalations.detail: The frame is a full-page screen (390x844), not a dialog. Architect confirmed no dedicated page exists. Implementing as a separate route is out of scope; implementing as inline state in login_view.dart is safe but requires architectural confirmation.
escalations.resolution: Human must approve: (a) create new forgot_password route (out of scope per PRD), or (b) implement as inline PageView/AnimatedSwitcher state within login_view.dart (recommended, no new route).
